nasb.text: The leader of the fathers’ households of the families of Merari was Zuriel the son of Abihail. They were to camp on the northward side of the tabernacle.

esv.text: And the chief of the fathers’ house of the clans of Merari was Zuriel the son of Abihail. They were to camp on the north side of the tabernacle.

cnv.text: 米拉利二家族的領袖，是亞比亥的兒子蘇列；他們要在帳幕的北方安營。

ccb.text: 亚比亥的儿子苏列做首领。他们要在圣幕的北面安营，
